final:
module register_8bit (
    input wire clk,
    input wire reset,
    input wire enable,
    input wire [8-1:1-1] d,
    output reg [7:0] q
);
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin
        if (reset) begin
            q <= 8'b0;
        end else if (enable) begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end
endmodule
